calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-01-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for short cause trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

John Zanghi, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff John Stewart Company.
Witness, Alzina Kalam, sworn and examined on behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendant Fallery Gourrier.
Court ordered Defendants DOES 1-5 dismissed without prejudice.

After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 242 Turk Street #505, City and County of San Francisco, California 94102.
Damages $961.00
Holdover damages $503.13
Pre-judgment interest $0
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $315.00
for a Total Judgment of $1779.13

Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Aug-01-2016 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-27-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: JPT: Adrian Colley; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff John Stewart Company is present. Represented by Larissa Troche.
Attorney John Zanghi for the plaintiff.
Defendant Fallery Gourrier IS NOT PRESENT.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar; no appearance by defendant. The trial date of AUG-01-2016 remains on calendar. (501)
